ourStory.headline: Our Story
ourStory.description_1st: We founded Optimus Health Solutions on a simple belief that no one should have to struggle to get their prescriptions from local pharmacies, and no community should lose its trusted independent pharmacy.
ourStory.description_2nd: By connecting patients with nearby local pharmacies, we make care faster, more personal, and closer to home.

banner.title: Your Fast and Reliable GateWay to Local Pharmacies
banner.description: Built to connect patients to their local pharmacies when access to presciption matters most.

titleOne.title: Your Fast and Reliable GateWay to Local Pharmacies
titleOne.description: Built to Connect patients to their local pharmacies when access to presciption matters most.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make patient access to prescriptions from their local pharmacies simple and convenient, while preserving the independence pharmacies that communities rely on.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A future where patients receive prescriptions and care from their local pharmacy quickly, securely and effortlessly — and independent pharmacies remain vital to every community.

storyTimeline.title: Who We Are
storyTimeline.paragraph1: Opened for business in 2026, Optimus Health Solutions is redefining how patients and communities get prescriptions from their local pharmacy. Our mission is simple: connect you with your trusted local pharmacy and make sure every prescription is delivered quickly, conveniently, and with care.
storyTimeline.paragraph2: Our platform lets you choose your preferred local pharmacy and have your prescriptions delivered to your home, workplace, or wherever you are. It's personal and easy and keeps you connected to your community.
features: Saves you a trip to the pharmacy
storyTimeline.emphasizedText: Just reliable access to care, powered by your neighborhood pharmacy.
storyTimeline.paragraph3: Our team works behind the scenes to make every transaction simple, fast, and stress-free. We partner with dedicated independent pharmacies to offer our services to you at zero cost, helping keep care local and communities strong.
storyTimeline.paragraph4: While the platform allows you to choose your preferred pharmacy to fill your prescriptions, we encourage you to support local independent pharmacies. They are more than just businesses; they are a vital part of the community fabric. That's why we partner with dedicated ones to offer our services to you at no cost, helping keep care close to home and communities strong.

storyTimeline.title: Why We Do It
storyTimeline.introText: At Optimus HS, we stand by two core beliefs:
numberedList: No one should have to struggle or change their daily routine just to get a prescription from their local pharmacy
And no community should have to lose its local pharmacy.
storyTimeline.paragraph1: Yet, across the U.S., more than 400 independent pharmacies close each year, which is about one every day. When a pharmacy shuts down, the community loses more than just a place to get medicine; it loses access, trust, convenience, and the personal care that big chains like CVS and Walgreens cannot offer. These closures create more "pharmacy deserts" and give even more power to these large corporations.
storyTimeline.paragraph2: Rising costs, shrinking margins, and unfair reimbursement practices from Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs) are driving local pharmacies out of business. PBMs and health systems often steer prescriptions to their own affiliated or in-house pharmacies, leaving mom-and-pop stores without the patient volume or script they need to stay in business.
storyTimeline.paragraph3: Many local pharmacies now offer same-day delivery to attract customers, but this service has turned into a broken promise, with delays and inefficiencies because it follows batch delivery routes that overlook patients who need their medication urgently.
storyTimeline.paragraph4: At Optimus HS, we've tailored our services to meet our users' needs on a personal level by removing friction, coordinating in real time, and staying ready to help. We believe that when patients can choose where their prescriptions go, and receive them without delay, they get the care they need at the right time, while helping independent pharmacies thrive.

values.title: Community First
values.description: Support and strengthen mom-and-pop pharmacy stores for healthier communities.

values.title: Patient Empowerment
values.description: Make access simple. Give people the power to choose their pharmacy with respect, privacy, reliability in every interaction.

values.title: Partnership and Transparency
values.description: Co-design solutions with partner pharmacies to build trust and shared success.

readyToExperience.title: Ready to experience the convenience of Optimus Heath Solutions?
readyToExperience.description: Join a growing community of patients and local pharmacies committed to easier access to Prescriptions.

banner.title: "How It Works" - Simple, Secure and Local
banner.description: We handle the stress so you can focus on your health, in partnership with your trusted local pharmacy.

howItWorks.headline: Prescription Delivery

steps.title: Request  Delivery
steps.description: Simply use our platform to request delivery in minutes. Enter your pharmacy location and delivery address, then choose your preferred day and time for delivery. You can create an account for easy process or checkout as guest.

steps.title: Get it Delivered
steps.description: Relax! Once the pharmacy receives and confirms fulfilment for pickup, we will deliver your prescription to the location you choose. Your order will arrive quickly, securely and conveniently.

howItWorks.message: When you refill or transfer a prescription, or schedule care, Optimus HS connnects you with your trusted local pharmacy to make the process fast, reliable, and stress-free. Your copay (if applicable) stays the same, and Rx delivery is free when you choose a partner independent pharmacy near you.

descriptionOfProcess.title: Refill Prescription
descriptionOfProcess.description: Need a refill? Simply submit your refill request through our platform. We'll connect with your selected local pharmacy to process it quickly. Once filled, you'll get an instant update to track or schedule delivery right to your doorstep.

descriptionOfProcess.title: Transfer Prescription
descriptionOfProcess.description: It only takes a minute to transfer your prescription from your old pharmacy to your preferred local one. We'll securely send your details to the new pharmacy and confirm the transfer within a day. Once it's ready, you'll be notified to schedule your delivery wherever and whenever you need it.

descriptionOfProcess.title: Schedule Essential Healthcare Services
descriptionOfProcess.description: Easily schedule vaccinations, health screenings, or wellness consultations at your preferred local pharmacy. We'll coordinate your appointment details and confirm your slot instantly. It's convenient, secure, and community-based care at no extra cost to you.

benefit.title: See all our Benefits
benefits: Zero cost to deliver Rx when using our partner pharmacies
